description:
After reduce_module, every call-terminator in module.fns has a
matching CallsiteId in callsite_outcomes.

Debug-build assertion at the end of reduce_module. Iterate every fn,
every block, every call-bearing terminator; assert presence in the
outcomes table.

## Acceptance

- Debug build of cargo test passes with the assertion enabled.
- Release build: assertion stripped (cfg(debug_assertions)).
- Failure modes:
  - A call-terminator with no outcome → bug in B.1/B.2 coverage.
  - An outcome for a callsite that doesn't exist → write-after-rewrite
    bug or stale outcome.

## Removes

Nothing yet.
title: fz-CO.B.3 — Debug-build invariant: every callsite has an outcome
